game_name: Spider-Man: Return of the Sinister Six

element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Ranged combat; requires web fluid collection
Level completion requires finding specific items
Each level culminates in a distinct boss fight; pattern learning required
Doctor Octopus and Mysterio regenerate multiple times; stamina management

typical_relief_triggers: Clearing enemy waves within a level section
Reaching safe platform areas between hazards
typical_tension_triggers: Navigating sections with multiple simultaneous hazards
Web fluid depletion requiring melee combat
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Linear escalation with boss climax per level; minimal downtime; constant pressure from enemies and platforming demands

difficulty_curve.early_game: Introductory platforming with basic enemy patterns; establishes movement and attack mechanics
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Increased enemy density; introduction of item-finding objectives requiring exploration; moderately challenging platforming
difficulty_curve.late_game: Cumulative enemy difficulty; boss encounters demand pattern recognition and stamina management; Mysterio and Doctor Octopus multi-phase fights
notable_spikes: First boss encounter (Electro) - introduces boss pattern mechanics
Mid-game item collection levels - require backtracking and exploration efficiency
Late-game bosses (Mysterio, Doctor Octopus) - multi-phase regeneration patterns
Final act platforming sections - combined hazards and enemy pressure

notable_level_patterns.description: Standard levels mix straightforward left-to-right progression with mandatory item collection (keys, detonators). Enemies and hazards punctuate progression; objectives require exploration loops
Each level terminates in a confined boss arena. Boss pattern recognition and stamina management form the core challenge. Health bars may regenerate multiple times (NES version)
Wall and tree climbing sections interrupt horizontal scrolling, offering brief vertical navigation challenges and alternate routes
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Levels with environmental climbing mechanics (specific levels not detailed in sources)

notable_level_patterns.description: Sections requiring web-swing mechanics to cross gaps or access areas; demands timing and spatial awareness
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Early to mid-game levels emphasizing mobility
